title: thebasics:thebasics-handbook-title-guide
text: The BASICs is primarily an RP chat and character identity mod. It adds proximity roleplay chat, visible character sheets, nicknames, notes, teleport requests, player stats, and staff tools. Server config controls which features are enabled, what privileges they require, ranges, formatting, and whether helper systems such as chatter, bubbles, languages, notes, TPA, or stats are available. Start here - Use /thebasics help for the short command summary. - Use /thebasics guide or press H and choose The BASICs in the handbook. - Use /say, /whisper, /yell, /me, /it, and /ooc for RP chat. - Use /nick and /nickcolor for RP display names when enabled. - Use Ctrl+Shift+B or /charsheet to open your character sheet when character sheets are enabled. - Use /chatprefs help if roleplay colors are hard to read. - Use /notes for private notes and /adminnotes <player> for staff notes when you have permission. Guide pages - RP Chat: proximity speech, emotes, OOC, nicknames, bubbles, and chatter. - Character Sheets: bios, /look, headshots, character slots, and nickname integration. - Languages and Accessibility: language prefixes, language colors, and chat color presets. - Notes: private notes, staff notes, structured entries, and freeform ledgers. - TPA: request-based teleporting and optional temporal gear costs. - Player Stats: tracked deaths, kills, block breaks, travel, and staff cleanup. - Utilities: save notifications, sleep notices, and repair helper tools. - Staff and Config: admin config, chat inspection, command help, and permissions.
